code_after: public abstract void skipBytes(final long numBytes) throws IOException;
javadoc_before: /** * Skip over numBytes bytes. The contract on this method is that it should have the * same behavior as reading the same number of bytes into a buffer and discarding its content. * Negative values of numBytes are not supported. */
javadoc_after: /** * Skip over numBytes bytes. This method may skip bytes in whatever way is most * optimal, and may not have the same behavior as reading the skipped bytes. In general, negative * numBytes are not supported. */
